TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fred_Beretta, title = Fred_Beretta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fred_Beretta} }

S.FORM: == Fred Beretta == Fred Beretta sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1917 , ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 1, Fred Beretta, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1962) Fred Beretta, t'aring kawas tay 1940 tehuk kawas tay 1937, mqwas biru sa Purdue pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Fred Beretta == Fred Beretta sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1917 , ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 1, Fred Beretta, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1962) Fred Beretta, t'aring kawas tay 1940 tehuk kawas tay 1937, mqwas biru sa Purdue pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *re* βeretta == *re* βeretta s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *re* βeretta, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *re* βeretta, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pur*ue pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
